title: selaginella breedlovei
intro: Selaginella breedlovei, also known as Breedlove's spikemoss, is a species of spikemoss in the family Selaginellaceae. It is a type of evergreen, terrestrial plant that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and acting as an antioxidant to protect against cell damage. In traditional herbal preparations, Selaginella breedlovei is often used to make teas, infusions, and poultices, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
